title: cellaigs: Drop initializer list in call to `IdString::in`
body:
Remove superfluous curly braces in call to IdString::in to address a compilation error (reproduced below) under GCC 9 and earlier.

	kernel/cellaigs.cc:395:18: error: call to member function 'in' is ambiguous
	if (cell->type.in({ID($gt), ID($ge)}))
	~~~~~~~~~~~^~
	./kernel/rtlil.h:383:8: note: candidate function
	bool in(const std::string &rhs) const { return *this == rhs; }
	^
	./kernel/rtlil.h:384:8: note: candidate function
	bool in(const pool &rhs) const { return rhs.co...
	^

Should fix #3885.
